value.stringValue: Duplicate account with DrCrono Id {!formAccountChronoId} found, DrChrono Id NOT Updated
Email field blank, set boolEmailFieldBlank flow variable to true
Screenflow - Account - Set DrChrono Id Flow Entered

assignments.name: Assign_Account_Record
assignments.label: Assign Account Record and Email Match Found

decisions.name: Does_Record_Email_Match_current_Provider_Email
decisions.label: Does Record Email Match current Provider Email

fields.name: ProviderDisplayName
fields.fieldText:
Name: {!txtFirstName} {!txtLastName}


Email: {!txtEmail}

Job Title: {!txtJobTitle}

Speciality: {!txtSpeciality}

DrChrono Id: {!rec_UpdatedAccount.DrChrono_Id__c}


Please verify that this is the correct provider and press Assign Dr Chrono ID at the bottom of the screen.


Otherwise, press the toggle to find the correct provider from a list of active providers in the selected practice group.

fields.name: DataTableInfo
fields.fieldText: Select the appropriate provider from the list below. If you cannot find them, close this window and contact your system administrator.

fields.name: DsplyTxtDuplicateValue
fields.fieldText:
It looks like this Dr Chrono ID has already been associated with another Account. All Accounts must have unique Dr Chrono IDs.


Check the account associated with {!Get_Patient_Records.Name} to make sure you don't have a duplicate account.

fields.name: Error
fields.fieldText:
We ran into a problem getting the profiles from the EHR


{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

fields.name: HelpTextPracticeGroupSelection
fields.fieldText:
Select the appropriate practice group to find the Dr Chrono account associated with this Affiliate Provider record.


If we are unable to find it, you can select the appropriate provider from a list of active providers in the practice group.
